ops.text: test_codex_ask_concurrent_scratch_reuse_never_crashes is load-flaky: failed once in a full `-k codex_ask` run that immediately followed a go test -race + golangci pass on the same machine, then passed in isolation and in two subsequent full runs. Timing-sensitive concurrency golden (Phase A-authored); nothing in the Phase C diff touches its path. If it flakes in CI, the fix belongs in the golden's timing assumptions, not the binary.
